category_sources: source_facts.description says formatter for Haskell source code; Hackage package page says Ormolu is a formatter for Haskell source code: https://hackage.haskell.org/package/ormolu
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is ormolu; official README/package page heading uses Ormolu: https://hackage.haskell.org/package/ormolu
docs_sources: Official Hackage page includes README documentation and source repo metadata for Ormolu: https://hackage.haskell.org/package/ormolu
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository URL; Hackage Source repo is https://github.com/tweag/ormolu.git.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and Hackage metadata identify Ormolu as a Haskell source formatter with executable ormolu.
